text.message: sry red, oj really forced my hand here

oj u got a brick to trade?
does it look like i have a chance to win>
ill help u with ore man

So in response she has to hand it to blue

inly person selling is u green
green dont have a clue lol

cant blame them considering how painful it is to play with u
